## Schneider SELogic for Home Assistant — v1.0.1

Maintenance release. No functional changes.

### Changes

- Repository renamed to `schneider_selogic` per HACS naming policy (names must not contain "HACS")
- Updated `manifest.json` documentation and issue tracker URLs

### Install (HACS)

1. Add custom repo: `https://github.com/magicbear/schneider_selogic` (Integration)
2. Install **Schneider SELogic** and restart HA
3. Add integration via **Settings → Devices & services**

Full release notes: [RELEASE_NOTES.md](https://github.com/magicbear/schneider_selogic/blob/v1.0.1/RELEASE_NOTES.md)
